search_surfaces: Google Drive search: Switzerland, Swiss, UK Switzerland, Azyra, maritime, ZEVI, CMDC

local_findings.finding: Partner-targeting material and outreach drafts exist for SwissChips/ETH, Kandou, Sensirion, Corintis, and Swiss engineering-biology ecosystem targets. These are target lists and draft requests, not confirmed partner commitments.
Completion workbook identifies the remaining IFS sections and partner/budget evidence required before draft completion or submission.

Azyra audit-scan capability note supports OCR review, stock-master validation, held-row separation, and batch-ready workbook generation. Use as Class A/C technical capability evidence, not partner evidence.
Azyra master reconciliation note supports controlled warehouse reconciliation, row-level gates, and after-state verification. Use as Class A/C technical capability evidence, not partner evidence.
Azyra production-admin note supports evidence-gated operational workflow and live-submit gating. It explicitly requires stage evidence and submit gates; it does not provide a grant partner or budget.
Contains funder-safe text for Aureon Evidence Automation, Azyra/warehouse demonstrators, and work packages. Draft material only; not submitted and not a partner commitment.

drive_findings.title: Aureon Grant War Room - 2026-07-04
drive_findings.finding: Drive spreadsheet lists UK-Switzerland CR&D as requiring Swiss implementation partner and research institute, and lists Azyra as a grant-ready work package. No confirmed partner, budget, or work-package commitment was found in this result.

drive_findings.title: AUREON_GRANT_OPERATING_LOG.md / AUREON_GRANT_OPERATING_LOG_REFRESHED_20260705.md
drive_findings.finding: Drive operating logs preserve the same partner blockers for UK-Switzerland and academic/international routes. They do not contain confirmed partner or budget evidence.

drive_findings.title: MASTER_WORK_INDEX_20260705.md
drive_findings.finding: Drive master index identifies Azyra Warehouse Automation as A/C evidence and explicitly says it needs process-owner/customer context and quantified time/error evidence.

drive_findings.title: aureon azyra folder
drive_findings.finding: Drive folder exists and contains a nested repo-style folder with hidden/tool folders. No partner budget, Swiss partner, maritime asset, vessel, port, shipyard, or grant commitment evidence was identified by folder listing.
Exact Drive searches for ZEVI and CMDC returned no results.

next_actions: Use Azyra warehouse notes as supporting Class A/C work-package evidence only where a partner-led project needs evidence automation or reconciliation assurance.
Use existing UK-Switzerland partner request drafts to request missing partner/budget facts, but do not send until destination and payload are action-time approved.
Do not complete or submit UK-Switzerland draft 10210100 until partner and budget evidence exists.
Do not open ZEVI/CMDC final submission routes until maritime partner, asset, site, safety, and budget evidence exists.
